Defines weather type tuples with attributes like ID, color, and timeline resource ID.

# Purpose
The code defines a set of weather types using a macro `WEATHER_TYPE_TUPLE`, which associates each weather type with specific attributes. These attributes include a unique identifier (`id`), a numeric identifier (`numeric_id`), background color (`bg_color`), text color (`text_color`), and a timeline resource identifier (`timeline_resource_id`). This file is likely used as a configuration or definition file where modifications to weather type entries or attributes are centralized. The use of macros suggests that this code is intended to be included in other parts of a program, allowing for consistent and centralized management of weather type data. The `#undef WEATHER_TYPE_TUPLE` at the end indicates that the macro is undefined after its use, which is a common practice to prevent macro redefinition errors in other parts of the code.
